# PERF-033 negative: range loop terminates early with a break
lang: go
file: PERF-033-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Process(c *gin.Context) {
	items := c.GetStringSlice("items")
	for i := 0; i < len(items); i++ {
		if items[i] == "stop" {
			break
		}
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
